name: BIOXYTRAN, INC
summary: PART I . GENERAL ORGANIZATION AND BUSINESS Bioxytran, Inc. (we, us, or the Company) is a clinical stage pharmaceutical company focused on the development, manufacture and commercialization of therapeutic drugs designed to address hypoxia in humans, which is a lack of oxygen to tissues. Hypoxia needs to be addressed quickly, otherwise it results in necrosis, which is the death of cells comprising body tissue. Necrosis cannot be reversed.
